# devlo

> Swiss B2B outbound agency specializing in lead generation and qualified meeting booking via multichannel campaigns (cold email, LinkedIn, cold calling).

## About

- Founded in 2020 in Rivaz, Switzerland (Vaud)
- US office in Albuquerque, NM
- More than 1,000 campaigns deployed
- Multilingual team: French, English, German, Dutch
- Areas served: Switzerland, Belgium, France, Germany, Luxembourg, USA, Canada

## Services

- [Multichannel Outbound Prospecting](https://devlo.ch/services/outbound-multicanal): Combined email, LinkedIn, and calling strategy to maximize B2B meetings.
- [B2B Cold Email](https://devlo.ch/services/cold-email): Personalized email campaigns at scale to generate qualified leads.
- [LinkedIn Outreach](https://devlo.ch/services/linkedin-outreach): Prospecting via Sales Navigator and personalized LinkedIn messaging.
- [B2B Cold Calling](https://devlo.ch/services/cold-calling): Outsourced teleprospecting with objection handling and custom scripts.
- [Intent Data](https://devlo.ch/services/intent-data): Identify hot prospects using buying intent signals.
- [Clay Enrichment](https://devlo.ch/services/enrichissement-clay): Multi-source data enrichment for ultra-targeted prospect lists.
- [Lead Generation](https://devlo.ch/services/generation-leads): Build qualified ICP lists with data verification.
- [Lead Qualification](https://devlo.ch/services/qualification-leads): Outsourced SDR to qualify prospects before handoff to sales teams.
- [Meeting Booking](https://devlo.ch/services/prise-de-rendez-vous): Book qualified meetings with target decision-makers.
- [CRM & Deliverability](https://devlo.ch/services/crm-delivrabilite): HubSpot, Salesforce setup and email deliverability optimization.

## Case Studies

- [Horus Software — EUR 200K in signed contracts](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/logiciel-comptable-200k-ca): Accounting software, 80 qualified meetings, 45 new clients in Belgium.
- [HR Tech — 54 DACH meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/hr-54-rendez-vous-dach): HR solution, 54 meetings in the DACH region.
- [Urban Cleanliness — 71 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/proprete-urbaine-71-rendez-vous): Cleaning services, 71 meetings generated.
- [Biofuels — 52 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/biocarburants-52-rendez-vous): Biofuels sector, 52 qualified meetings.
- [Training — 14 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/formation-14-rendez-vous): Training organization, 14 B2B meetings.
- [Audiovisual — 16 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/audiovisuel-16-rendez-vous): Audiovisual company, 16 meetings.
- [Cybersecurity — 4,500 companies](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/cybersecurite-4500-entreprises): Cybersecurity solution, campaign reaching 4,500 companies.
- [Biodiversity — 70 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/biodiversite-70-rendez-vous): Biodiversity sector, 70 meetings generated.
- [Mobility — 40 prospects](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/mobilite-40-prospects): Mobility solution, 40 qualified prospects.
- [Merchandising — 23 prospects](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/merchandising-23-prospects): Merchandising, 23 qualified prospects.
- [Real Estate — 11 prospects](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/immobilier-11-prospects): Real estate, 11 prospects generated.
- [Real Estate — 30 prospects](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/immobilier-30-prospects): Real estate, 30 qualified prospects.
- [Monizze — 120 meetings](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/monizze-120-rendez-vous): Belgian fintech, 120 qualified meetings.
- [IDDI — Biotech pharma lead generation](https://devlo.ch/etudes-de-cas/iddi-generation-leads-biotech-pharma): Biotech/pharma CRO, qualified lead generation.

## Prospecting by Country

- [B2B Prospecting in Switzerland](https://devlo.ch/prospection-commerciale-suisse): Targeted B2B campaigns for the Swiss market (Romandy, German-speaking, Ticino).
- [B2B Prospecting in Belgium](https://devlo.ch/prospection-commerciale-belgique): B2B campaigns in French and Dutch for the Belgian market.
- [B2B Prospecting in France](https://devlo.ch/prospection-commerciale-france): Outbound campaigns for the French market.

## Insights

- [94 B2B Buying Intent Signals](https://devlo.ch/insights/buying-signals): Complete guide to 94 B2B buying signals categorized by company, person, tech stack, product usage, community, and events. Detect purchase-ready prospects before your competitors.
- [25 B2B Cold Email Sequences](https://devlo.ch/insights/cold-email-templates): 25 tested cold email sequences with real results. Industry, metrics, complete emails -- ready-to-use templates for B2B prospecting.

## Blog

- [B2B Cold Email: Complete Guide](https://devlo.ch/blog/cold-email-b2b-guide-complet): How to structure and deploy high-performing cold email campaigns.
- [Outsourcing Commercial Prospecting](https://devlo.ch/blog/externaliser-prospection-commerciale): Decision guide for outsourcing B2B prospecting.
- [Intent Data: Identify Prospects](https://devlo.ch/blog/intent-data-prospects-prets-acheter): Using buying intent signals to target the right prospects.
